title: The magic ring, Vol. 2 (of 3)

authors.name: La Motte-Fouqué, Friedrich Heinrich Karl, Freiherr de

summaries: "The Magic Ring, Vol. 2 (of 3)" by La Motte-Fouqué is a novel published in 1812. This chivalric romance follows German knight Otto as he searches for a magical ring to return to its rightful owner. His quest draws him into dangerous intrigues and the Northern Crusades, where he battles pagans in Finland's dark forests. Set in an idealized medieval Europe, the story weaves together Christian themes, political ideals of European unity, and classic elements of romantic adventure through mysterious twists and revelations.
